description.p: QA Scribe helps testers turn exploratory testing sessions, evidence, findings, and notes into structured testware while keeping project data local.

ul.li: Preserve pending Note, Draft, and Finding edits across Session switches and window close.
Sanitize generated rich HTML and persist generated outputs with AI Run completion atomically.
Bound concurrent AI jobs and clean up provider probe child process groups.
Strengthen release validation and rich editor accessibility semantics.
Keep startup bounded by skipping full current-schema foreign-key scans while still validating migrations.
Boot from a bounded recent Session list and minimal active Note state.
Load Draft and Finding bodies lazily when their views or creation flows need them.
Enforce safe attachment relative paths for all core callers.
Keep note title autosave from applying stale saves.
Allow Finding kind and metadata edits after creation.
